## Checklist

- [ ] `just pre` is green (fmt check, clippy, tests, docs — see CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Tests cover the change; a bug fix has a test that fails without it.
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits and stay atomic.
- [ ] README/docs updated if behaviour or flags changed.
